# New Pull Request

> Please use this template when submitting a pull request. It makes reviewing your code much easier and faster, which means your contribution can be merged in faster! Feel free to delete this section and the instructions before submitting your pull request, but please keep the checkbox at the end.

Closes # (issue number) (delete this line if your pull request does not close an issue)

## Description

Here is where you'll describe what your pull request does. If it fixes a bug, please include the issue number and a description of how to reproduce the bug. If it adds a feature, please include a description of the feature and how to use it.

### Expected Behaviour

(Psst, delete this if your pull request doesn't fix a bug!) Here is where you'll describe the expected behaviour of the bug you fixed. This should be a clear and concise description of what should happen when the bug is fixed.

### Actual Behaviour

(Psst, delete this if your pull request doesn't fix a bug!) Here is where you'll describe the actual behaviour of the bug you fixed. This should be a clear and concise description of what happens when the bug is not fixed.

### Reproduction Steps

(Yeah, delete this too if your pull request doesn't fix a bug!) Here is where you'll describe the steps to reproduce the bug you fixed. This should be a clear and concise list of steps that someone can follow to see the bug in action.

## Optional Checkboxes

- [ ] I would like to join Team Crystalline Organisation on GitHub.
- [ ] I would like the Developer role in the Lighthouse Discord server. (We'll ask you for your Discord username in the comments and assign the role after your pull request is merged in.)

## Required Checkboxes

- [ ] If my changes affected the database, I have discussed this with EscapeToTheCity first. (You can leave this one unchecked if your changes did not affect the database.)
- [ ] I have read the CONTRIBUTING.md file and followed the instructions for contributing to the project.
- [ ] I have guerilla tested my code to the best of my ability and am confident that it works as intended.
- [ ] I have not used an AI code generator to write this code.
